inflation_definition: I-Bitcoin inenani elimisiwe lezinhlamvu ezingu-21 million ezingeke zandiswe. Ngokungafani nomali kahulumeni, akekho ongaphrinta i-Bitcoin eyengeziwe. Khetha imali yakho ngezansi ukuze ufunde ukuthi infleshini ithinta kanjani amandla akho okuthenga nokuthi i-Bitcoin ingasiza kanjani.
inflation_description: I-Bitcoin inenani elimisiwe le-Bitcoin ezingu-21 million ezizokhona. Akekho ongaphrinta i-Bitcoin eyengeziwe futhi abangele infleshini.
inflation_sticker_what_if: KUTHIWANI UMA IMALI YAKHO IBINGENA INFLESHINI?
inflation_usd_s1_c1: Uma ubeke $100 ebhange eminyakeni engu-5 edlule, unamandla okuthenga angaphansi kwe-$100 namuhla.
inflation_usd_s1_c4: Kungenzeka usenawo awo $100 e-akhawuntini yakho yasebhange, kodwa akuthenga ngaphansi kunangaleso sikhathi.
inflation_usd_s1_c5: E-United States, akukho mkhawulo omisiwe wamanani amadola ase-US angadalwa. Le nani elingenamkhawulo liyimbangela eyinhloko yenfleshini.
inflation_usd_s1_c7: inani eliphelele lamadola ase-US lenyuke lisuka ku-$4 trillion laya ku-$18 trillion.
inflation_usd_s1_c8: Lokhu kuphrintwa kwemali kubangele infleshini eyinkulu.
inflation_usd_s1_c9: Konke kubiza kakhulu manje, ngoba ukuphrintwa kwemali kwenze amadola akho abe nenani elincane.
inflation_intro_c1: Infleshini yenzeka lapho imali eningi iphrintwa noma idalwa emoyeni. Lokhu kwenza imali yakho ibe nenani elincane ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.
inflation_intro_c2: Njengoba imali eningi idalwa ngezikweletu zesabelomali nezindlela zokusebenzisa ezintsha, imali onayo ikuthenga ngaphansi njengoba isikhathi sihamba. Ngoba imali eningi kangaka iphrintiwe eminyakeni embalwa edlule, inani lemali e-akhawuntini yakho yasebhange nasephaketheni lakho lehlile kakhulu ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.
inflation_intro_c3: Nge-Bitcoin, kunomkhawulo omisiwe we-Bitcoin ezingu-21 million ezizokhona. Ngoba i-Bitcoin eyengeziwe ayikwazi ukudalwa, inani layo lenyuke kakhulu ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.
inflation_intro_usd: E-United States, akukho mkhawulo omisiwe wamanani amadola angadalwa.
inflation_intro_cad: ECanada, akukho mkhawulo omisiwe wamanani amadola ase-Canada angadalwa.
inflation_intro_euro: KuEurozone, akukho mkhawulo omisiwe wamanani ama-Euro angadalwa.
inflation_intro_gbp: E-United Kingdom, akukho mkhawulo omisiwe wamanani amapondo ase-British angadalwa.
inflation_intro_brazilian_real: EBrazil, akukho mkhawulo omisiwe wamanani amareais ase-Brazil angadalwa.
inflation_intro_philippine_peso: EPhilippines, akukho mkhawulo omisiwe wamanani amapeso ase-Philippines angadalwa.
inflation_intro_mexican_peso: EMexico, akukho mkhawulo omisiwe wamanani amapeso ase-Mexico angadalwa.
inflation_intro_indian_rupee: EIndia, akukho mkhawulo omisiwe wamanani amarupee ase-India angadalwa.
inflation_intro_honduran_lempira: EHonduras, akukho mkhawulo omisiwe wamanani amalempira ase-Honduras angadalwa.
inflation_intro_venezuelan_bolivar: EVenezuela, akukho mkhawulo omisiwe wamanani amabolivar ase-Venezuela angadalwa.
inflation_intro_japanese_yen: EJapan, akukho mkhawulo omisiwe wamanani amayeni ase-Japan angadalwa.
inflation_intro_australian_dollar: EAustralia, akukho mkhawulo omisiwe wamanani amadola ase-Australia angadalwa.
inflation_intro_israeli_shekel: EIsrael, akukho mkhawulo omisiwe wamanani amashekeli ase-Israel angadalwa.
inflation_intro_thai_baht: EThailand, akukho mkhawulo omisiwe wamanani amabaht ase-Thai angadalwa.
inflation_intro_nz_dollar: ENew Zealand, akukho mkhawulo omisiwe wamanani amadola ase-New Zealand angadalwa.
inflation_cause_c1: Nakuba izinhlelo zokuthuthwa nokunikwa kwezinkampani ezithile zifaka isandla ekukhuleni kwentengo ngendlela eyenziwa, imbangela eyinhloko yenfleshini ukukhuliswa kwenani lemali.
inflation_cause_c2: Lokhu kwaba ukukhuliswa okukhulu kwenani lemali futhi ngeke kube yisikhathi sokugcina lokhu kwenzeka.
inflation_cause_c3: Lapho imali eningi idalwa emoyeni, intengo yayo yonke into kuleyo mali iyakhula. Lokhu kufaka phakathi izindleko zezinto zethu ezingakakhokheleki izinkampani ekumele zikhokhele imisebenzi yazo, okusho intengo ephezulu kuwe.
inflation_cause_c4: Infleshini akuyona nje intengo ekhulayo. Infleshini yilapho imali yakho iba yize ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.
inflation_cause_usd: Cishe amaphesenti angu-80% wawo wonke amadola ase-US akhona namuhla adalwa phakathi kuka-2020 no-2023.
inflation_cause_cad: Ngaphezu kwe-1 ku-5 amadola ase-Canada akhona namuhla adalwa phakathi kuka-2020 no-2022.
inflation_cause_euro: Cishe i-1 ku-4 yama-Euro akhona namuhla adalwa phakathi kuka-2020 no-2022.
inflation_cause_gbp: Cishe i-1 ku-4 yamapondo ase-British akhona namuhla adalwa phakathi kuka-2020 no-2022.
inflation_cause_brazilian_real: Cishe amaphesenti angu-40% awo wonke amareais ase-Brazil akhona namuhla adalwa phakathi kuka-2020 no-2022.
inflation_cause_philippine_peso: Cishe amaphesenti angu-50% awo wonke amapeso ase-Philippines akhona namuhla adalwa phakathi kuka-2020 no-2022.
inflation_cause_mexican_peso: Ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angu-50% awo wonke amapeso ase-Mexico akhona namuhla adalwa phakathi kuka-2016 no-2022.
inflation_cause_indian_rupee: Ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angu-50% awo wonke amarupee ase-India akhona namuhla adalwa phakathi kuka-2016 no-2022.
inflation_cause_honduran_lempira: Ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angu-50% awo wonke amalempira ase-Honduras akhona namuhla adalwa phakathi kuka-2016 no-2022.
inflation_cause_venezuelan_bolivar: Ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angu-80% awo wonke amabolivar ase-Venezuela akhona namuhla adalwa ngonyaka owedlule!
inflation_cause_japanese_yen: Ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angu-25% awo wonke amayeni ase-Japan akhona namuhla adalwa phakathi kuka-2016 no-2022.
inflation_cause_australian_dollar: Ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angu-50% awo wonke amadola ase-Australia akhona namuhla adalwa phakathi kuka-2016 no-2022.
inflation_cause_israeli_shekel: Cishe amaphesenti angu-50% awo wonke amashekeli ase-Israel akhona namuhla adalwa phakathi kuka-2016 no-2023.
inflation_cause_thai_baht: Cishe amaphesenti angu-35% awo wonke amabaht ase-Thai akhona namuhla adalwa phakathi kuka-2016 no-2023.
inflation_cause_nz_dollar: Cishe amaphesenti angu-50% awo wonke amadola ase-New Zealand akhona namuhla adalwa phakathi kuka-2010 no-2023.
inflation_issuance_c1: Infleshini empeleni icesho lakho le-'money pie' linciphile unyaka ngamunye. Ngakho i-Bitcoin inayo infleshini?
inflation_issuance_c2: I-Bitcoin inenani elimisiwe le-21,000,000 (21 million) bitcoin ezizokhona. Umkhawulo wenani le-21 million umisiwe ekhodini futhi uvikelwe yinethiwekhi yekhompyutha enamandla kunazo zonke emhlabeni, ebizwa nge-Bitcoin Network. Lo mkhawulo awukwazi ukushintshwa.
inflation_issuance_c3: Nakuba i-Bitcoin ingenawo infleshini, inenani elikhishwayo. Inani elikhishwayo iphesenti le-Bitcoin entsha embiwayo unyaka ngamunye. Abembi be-Bitcoin bavikela inethiwekhi, bacubungula izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin, futhi bakhokhwa ngomsebenzi wabo. Abembi be-Bitcoin bakhokhwa ngale nani entsha ekhishwayo (kuze kube iphelile) futhi bakhokhwe nezimali zezinkokhelo.
inflation_issuance_c4: Ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angu-95% awo wonke i-bitcoin asembiwe kakade. Ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angu-99% awo wonke i-bitcoin angu-21 million ayobe esembiwe ngonyaka ka-2035, futhi amaphesenti angaphansi kwe-1% asele azoqedwa ukumbiwa ngonyaka ka-2140.
inflation_issuance_c5: Nakuba kusekhona inani elithile elikhishwayo kuze kufinyelele inani elimisiwe le-bitcoin angu-21 million, iphuzu lonke ukuthi icesho lakho le-21 million bitcoin pie alincipha. Lokhu kuphikisana kakhulu nomali kahulumeni esiyisebenzisayo. Kulezo zinhlelo, icesho lakho lephaya linciphile unyaka ngamunye lapho imali eningi iphrintwa emoyeni.
inflation_protect_c1: I-Bitcoin emlandweni ibikahle ekuvikeleni abantu kunfleshini yemali yabo yendawo. Abantu abaningi abasebenzisa i-Bitcoin njengesivikelo senfleshini bagcina imali abangakwazi ukuyigcina njengo-Bitcoin iminyaka eminingi.
inflation_protect_c2: Inani elimisiwe le-Bitcoin liyenza ibe yindlela enhle kunazo zonke yokonga imali yakho isikhathi eside.
inflation_protect_c3: Lapho ugcinela ku-Bitcoin, yonke into ivame ukuba shibhile ngesikhathi eside. Lapho ugcinela emalini kahulumeni abangayiphrinta mahhala, yonke into ivame ukuba biza kakhulu.
inflation_protect_usd: Amadola ase-US alahlekelwe amaphesenti angu-90% amandla awo okuthenga kusukela ngo-1950 njengoba osopolitiki bephrinta eyengeziwe.
inflation_protect_cad: Amadola ase-Canada alahlekelwe ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angu-90% amandla awo okuthenga kusukela ngo-1971 njengoba osopolitiki bephrinta eyengeziwe.
inflation_protect_euro: Ama-Euro alahlekelwe ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angu-30% amandla awo okuthenga kusukela ekudalweni kwawo ngo-1999 njengoba osopolitiki bephrinta eyengeziwe.
inflation_protect_gbp: Amapondo ase-British alahlekelwe amaphesenti angu-90% amandla awo okuthenga kusukela ngo-1950 njengoba osopolitiki bephrinta eyengeziwe.
inflation_protect_brazilian_real: Inani lemali yamareais ase-Brazil lenyuke lisuka ku-R$427 billion laya ku-R$589 billion eminyakeni emi-2 nje njengoba osopolitiki bephrinta eyengeziwe.
inflation_protect_brazilian_real_2: Ngo-2020, uhulumeni wase-Brazil waphrinta inothimali entsha ye-R$200. Le nothimali iyodwa yayilingana ne-12.8% yawo wonke amareais aphrintwa ngalowo nyaka!
inflation_protect_philippine_peso: Inani lemali yamapeso ase-Philippines cishe liphindaphindeke kabili kusukela ngo-2020 njengoba osopolitiki bephrinta eyengeziwe.
inflation_protect_mexican_peso: Inani lemali yamapeso ase-Mexico cishe liphindaphindeke kabili kusukela ngo-2016 njengoba osopolitiki bephrinta eyengeziwe.
inflation_protect_indian_rupee: Inani lemali yamarupee ase-India liphindaphindeke ngaphezu kwekabili kusukela ngo-2016 njengoba osopolitiki bephrinta eyengeziwe.
inflation_protect_honduran_lempira: Inani lemali yamalempira ase-Honduras liphindaphindeke ngaphezu kwekabili kusukela ngo-2016 njengoba osopolitiki bephrinta eyengeziwe.
inflation_protect_venezuelan_bolivar: Inani lemali yamabolivar ase-Venezuela lenyuke ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angu-500% ngonyaka owedlule njengoba osopolitiki bephrinta eyengeziwe.
inflation_protect_japanese_yen: Inani lemali yamayeni ase-Japan lenyuke ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angu-33% kusukela ngo-2016 njengoba osopolitiki bephrinta eyengeziwe.
inflation_protect_australian_dollar: Inani lemali yamadola ase-Australia lenyuke ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angu-100% kusukela ngo-2016 njengoba osopolitiki bephrinta eyengeziwe.
inflation_protect_israeli_shekel: Inani lemali yamashekeli ase-Israel lenyuke ngamaphesenti angaba ngu-100% kusukela ngo-2016 njengoba osopolitiki bephrinta eyengeziwe.
inflation_protect_thai_baht: Inani lemali yamabaht ase-Thai lenyuke ngamaphesenti angaba ngu-50% kusukela ngo-2016 njengoba osopolitiki bephrinta eyengeziwe.
inflation_protect_nz_dollar: Inani lemali yamadola ase-New Zealand lenyuke ngamaphesenti angaba ngu-100% kusukela ngo-2010 njengoba osopolitiki bephrinta eyengeziwe.
